# Lily in Bloom

> A florist in Skelton, Teesside, run by Lily Calvert.
> Bespoke, hand-tied flowers for weddings, celebrations and every day.
> Tagline: bespoke, seasonal, hand-tied.

## Contact
- Address: 20 Glastonbury Road, Skelton, TS12 2YL, United Kingdom
- Phone: 07456 656182
- Owner and florist: Lily Calvert
- Delivery across Teesside: Saltburn, Guisborough, Marske, Redcar, Brotton

## Studio hours
- Tuesday to Saturday: 9am to 5pm
- Sunday and Monday: by appointment

## What she does
- Weddings and events: bridal bouquets, buttonholes, ceremony and table flowers (bespoke, by consultation)
- Birthdays and anniversaries: hand-tied bouquets (from £45)
- Seasonal and everyday: posies, new-home blooms, thank-yous (from £25)

## Pricing (guide)
- The Posy: from £25
- The Bouquet: from £45 (free local delivery in Skelton)
- The Statement: from £75
- Weddings and events: bespoke, by consultation

## Notes
- This page is a demo build by dean.id (https://dean.id).
